title: 日経賞の後に・花弁、ひらり

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehe... hehe. How did I do, Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehe... hehe. How did I do, Big Sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've gotten a lot better, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! Next up is the spring Tenno Sho,
so—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I... I came by myself today... to show my support.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You were spectacular, just like at the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Focusing on one goal and forging ahead... You're
just like a hero leading her people, worthy of
being memorialized in legend for generations to
come!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry... I got carried away...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, it's okay. Sorry. But... thanks.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit embarrassing... but I'm happy you said
that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I do want to become like the Blue Rose of Good
Fortune, after all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?! Do you remember the last page?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them talk excitedly about the book all
the way back to campus.
